---
title: "Research"
format: 
  html:
    respect-user-color-scheme: true
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <meta name="robots" content="noindex">
---

## Work in Progress
Price of Productivity, *with Gabriel Ahlfeldt, Stephan Heblich & Tobias Seidel*. [[Discussion Paper]](https://github.com/Ahlfeldt/DPs/blob/main/GA_SH_TS_FY_-_Productivity.pdf){target="_blank"}
